name: Blimpmon

signature_move.name: Zeppelin Explosion
signature_move.description: Fires cannonballs from its topside cannons at the enemy.

description: A Vehicle Digimon just like Mechanorimon , it flies in the skies without a care in the world. Although its delicate balloon portion is protected by a metallic coating, it seems to still be under construction as its left flank is left exposed. Its Signature Move is shooting bullets of helium gas and detonating them ( Helium Bomb ). Its Special Move is firing cannonballs from the two large cannons seated on its top ( Zeppelin Explosion ).
